title: All Items (Re)Craftable
description: A mod with which you can not only craft every item, but can also recraft many things (e.g. Diamond Helmet = 5 diamonds).
body:
# **Welcome to All Items Craftable + Recrafts**

I thought to myself: ‘I'll just make a craft mod with which every item is craftable...’ Then I sat down and started modding.
Now I have a mod with which you can not only **craft every item**, but can also **recraft many things** (e.g. Diamond Helmet = 5 diamonds). Many items are easier to get this way.

**Not all items are craftable at the moment, but this will be changed in newer versions! (Beta = not everything craftable)  
New recrafts will also be coming!**

I made this Mod with **[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)!**

**Report Issues on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc)!**

It could be helpful to use **[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)** to see the recipes...
